title: Choose Possibility
author: Sukhinder Singh Cassidy
subline: Why the only way to grow is to take more risks.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- Two paths diverging. The 'safe' path goes straight ahead (ash). The 'possible' path branches diagonally, with a series of branching decisions (red). -->
  <g transform="translate(0 1700)" fill="none">
    <!-- Safe path: straight, gray -->
    <g stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round">
      <line x1="0" y1="0" x2="1600" y2="0"/>
    </g>
    <!-- Possible path: branches and re-branches. The 'choice' is the red node where it diverges. -->
    <g stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round">
      <path d="M 200 0 Q 280 -50 360 -120 Q 420 -180 480 -240"/>
      <path d="M 480 -240 Q 540 -280 620 -300 Q 700 -320 760 -380"/>
      <path d="M 620 -300 Q 680 -360 760 -380 Q 840 -400 920 -460"/>
      <path d="M 760 -380 Q 820 -420 900 -480 Q 1000 -500 1100 -480"/>
      <path d="M 1100 -480 Q 1200 -460 1280 -500 Q 1380 -540 1480 -580"/>
    </g>
    <!-- The 'choice' node: where the possible path diverges from the safe path -->
    <circle cx="200" cy="0" r="14" fill="none" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="3"/>
    <circle cx="200" cy="0" r="5" fill="#fc1c46"/>
    <!-- Other small choice nodes (graphite, smaller) -->
    <circle cx="480" cy="-240" r="6" fill="#cccccc"/>
    <circle cx="760" cy="-380" r="6" fill="#cccccc"/>
    <circle cx="1100" cy="-480" r="6" fill="#cccccc"/>
    <!-- Labels -->
    <text x="20" y="40" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">SAFE</text>
    <text x="200" y="-50" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="500" fill="#fc1c46" letter-spacing="0.18em">CHOOSE</text>
    <text x="780" y="-410" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="500" fill="#cccccc" letter-spacing="0.18em">POSSIBLE</text>
  </g>
  <text x="800" y="2200" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.4em">EVERY CHOICE UNLOCKS THE NEXT</text>
</svg>
rationale: Two paths: a straight horizontal ash line ('SAFE') and a branching ash tree going up-and-right ('POSSIBLE'). The single point where the possible path branches off the safe one is the red dot — the 'CHOOSE' moment. Three smaller graphite dots mark sub-choices along the way. Title 320px uppercase, two lines, weight 500. The composition is a decision tree.
